# generated by calude's help
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.21)
project(openfish C)

# CPU sources that are always compiled.
set(OPENFISH_CPU_SOURCES
    src/misc.c
    src/error.c
    src/decode_cpu.c
    src/nn_cpu.c
    src/beam_search.c
    src/openfish.c
)

# CUDA GPU sources (relocatable device code; device-linked at the consuming target).
set(OPENFISH_CUDA_SOURCES
    src/decode_cuda.cu
    src/beam_search_cuda.cu
    src/scan_cuda.cu
    src/nn_cuda.cu
)

# ROCm/HIP GPU sources (relocatable device code).
set(OPENFISH_HIP_SOURCES
    src/beam_search_hip.hip
    src/scan_hip.hip
    src/decode_hip.hip
    src/nn_hip.hip
)

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Build the library
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------
if(OPENFISH_USE_ROCM)
    # Enable the HIP language so CMake knows how to compile .hip files.
    enable_language(HIP)

    set_source_files_properties(${OPENFISH_HIP_SOURCES} PROPERTIES LANGUAGE HIP)

    add_library(openfish STATIC
        ${OPENFISH_CPU_SOURCES}
        ${OPENFISH_HIP_SOURCES}
    )

    target_compile_definitions(openfish PRIVATE HAVE_ROCM=1)

    # -fgpu-rdc enables relocatable device code; device linking is deferred to
    # the final consuming target (mirroring the Makefile's --emit-static-lib
    # --hip-link step at the executable level).
    set_target_properties(openfish PROPERTIES HIP_SEPARABLE_COMPILATION ON)
    target_compile_options(openfish PRIVATE
        $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:HIP>:-fPIC>
    )

elseif(OPENFISH_USE_CUDA)
    enable_language(CUDA)

    add_library(openfish STATIC
        ${OPENFISH_CPU_SOURCES}
        ${OPENFISH_CUDA_SOURCES}
    )

    target_compile_definitions(openfish PRIVATE HAVE_CUDA=1)

    # CUDA_SEPARABLE_COMPILATION enables -rdc=true per-file; the device link
    # step runs at the consuming executable (matching the Makefile's nvcc -dlink).
    set_target_properties(openfish PROPERTIES CUDA_SEPARABLE_COMPILATION ON)

    target_compile_options(openfish PRIVATE
        $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-g -O2 -lineinfo>
    )

else()
    # CPU-only build (no GPU sources compiled).
    add_library(openfish STATIC ${OPENFISH_CPU_SOURCES})
endif()

# The public include directory is <openfish/openfish.h>.
# Callers that use #include "openfish.h" should add include/openfish to their
# include path; callers using the full path add include/.
target_include_directories(openfish
    PUBLIC
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include/openfish
    PRIVATE
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src
)

target_compile_options(openfish PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-O2 -Wall>
)
